metadata.description: Centralized validated signals database. ONLY signals that pass 2025/2026 out-of-sample validation.
metadata.validation_status: Cleaned - removed reversed/overfitted signals from prior analysis

signals_bet.description: Orange + New Moon + Calm = operational clarity. PEAK SIGNAL. Validated on 2025/2026.
New Moon dominates. Strongest single signal across all conditions. Validated on 2025/2026.
Orange in Calm conditions beats field 56.8% of rounds. Broadest, most stable signal. Validated on 2025/2026.
Full Moon + Calm. STRENGTHENED in 2025/2026 validation. Secondary peak signal.
Waxing + Calm. Broadest reliable signal (large n). Stable across time. Validated on 2025/2026.

signals_fade.description: Libra horoscope underperforms significantly. Stable fade signal. Validated on 2025/2026.

removed_signals.reason: 2025/2026 validation showed signals reversed or weakened beyond statistical significance

list.reason: Effect flipped sign in 2025/2026. Overfitted to earlier data.
Effect flipped sign in 2025/2026. Overfitted to earlier data.
Similar to other Color×Exec combinations which reversed. Removed preemptively.
Small sample (n=40). Color×Exec pattern suggests overfitting.
Not tested in 2025/2026 validation. Requires retest.
Not tested in 2025/2026 validation. Requires retest.
Not tested in 2025/2026 validation. Requires retest.

notes.sign_convention: vs_avg = score - course_avg. Negative = beats field (good). Positive = loses to field (bad).
notes.tier_1: Maximum conviction - use in direct matchup decisions
notes.tier_2: Strong conviction - enhance matchups as secondary filters
notes.validation_standard: 2025/2026 out-of-sample testing. Must hold p<0.05 AND maintain effect direction.
notes.key_insight: Archetypal signals (Orange × Moon × Condition) are STABLE. Color×Exec combos from prior analysis were OVERFITTED.
notes.how_to_add: New signals must pass 2025/2026 validation. Add to signals_bet or signals_fade with both historical and validated effects.
